email.subject: Your Trade Has Been Executed Successfully
email.body:
Trade Executed!

Your trade for {{amount}} {{asset}} has been executed at {{price}}.

Total value: {{totalValue}}

sms.subject: Trade Executed
sms.body: SwapTrade: Your trade for {{amount}} {{asset}} has been executed at ${{price}}. Total: ${{totalValue}}.

email.subject: URGENT: Position Liquidation Notice
email.body:
⚠️ Position Liquidated

Your position of {{amount}} {{asset}} has been liquidated at {{price}}.

If you have questions, please contact support immediately.

sms.subject: URGENT: Liquidation
sms.body: URGENT SwapTrade: Your {{asset}} position has been liquidated. Check your account now.

push.subject: ⚠️ Position Liquidated
push.body: Your {{asset}} position was liquidated. View details in your account.

email.subject: Deposit Received Successfully
email.body:
Deposit Confirmed!

We've received your deposit of {{amount}} {{asset}}.

Transaction hash: {{txHash}}

The funds are now available in your account.

sms.subject: Deposit Received
sms.body: SwapTrade: Deposit of {{amount}} {{asset}} received! Tx: {{txHash}}. Funds available now.

email.subject: Withdrawal Processed Successfully
email.body:
Withdrawal Complete

Your withdrawal of {{amount}} {{asset}} has been processed.

Destination address: {{address}}

Transaction hash: {{txHash}}

email.subject: Security Alert: New Login Detected
email.body:
⚠️ New Login Detected

A new login was detected on your account from {{ipAddress}} at {{timestamp}}.

If this wasn't you, please secure your account immediately.

sms.subject: Security Alert
sms.body: SwapTrade SECURITY: New login from {{ipAddress}}. If not you, reset your password now.

push.subject: ⚠️ Security Alert
push.body: New login detected on your account
